positioning.one_sentence: A deterministic, evidence-first Deep Research Agent that emits grounded report bundles instead of chat-only answers.
what_it_does: Runs deterministic research jobs through planning, collection, extraction, claim auditing, synthesis, and rendering stages.
Emits reviewable bundle artifacts with report text, sources, claims, audit outputs, and manifest sidecars.
Supports CLI, batch, and local HTTP API entrypoints over the same runtime contract.
why_not_a_toy_demo: The output contract is a report bundle, not just console prose.
Source policy, snapshot provenance, and claim-audit gates are part of the runtime contract.
Cancel, retry, resume, refine, and stale-recovery flows are measured in deterministic suites.
The HTTP API is real but explicitly local-only and not marketed as a hosted SaaS surface.

completion_rate.measure: Completed jobs divided by total evaluated jobs.
completion_rate.why_it_matters: A research agent that cannot finish jobs cannot be trusted as an execution surface.
completion_rate.failure_mode: Failed or abandoned jobs lower the rate and leave the release manifest unable to pass.

bundle_emission_rate.measure: Completed research jobs that emitted a report bundle.
bundle_emission_rate.why_it_matters: This proves the system produces machine-readable report bundles instead of prose-only output.
bundle_emission_rate.failure_mode: Completed jobs without bundles would make downstream review, audit, and delivery unreliable.

critical_claim_support_precision.measure: Critical claims backed by grounded support edges.
critical_claim_support_precision.why_it_matters: Deep research value depends on whether important claims stay evidence-backed.
critical_claim_support_precision.failure_mode: Unsupported critical claims slip through with weak or missing grounding.

citation_error_rate.measure: Citation checks that fail grounding or linkage requirements.
citation_error_rate.why_it_matters: Low citation error is the minimum bar for an evidence-first research runtime.
citation_error_rate.failure_mode: Broken or mismatched citations make the bundle look polished while being unverifiable.

provenance_completeness.measure: Claims, sources, and citations that keep snapshot lineage intact.
provenance_completeness.why_it_matters: Provenance is what separates a reviewable research bundle from an untraceable summary.
provenance_completeness.failure_mode: Snapshot references disappear and reviewers cannot trace claims back to collected evidence.

policy_compliance_rate.measure: Source accesses that satisfy the configured source-policy contract.
policy_compliance_rate.why_it_matters: The agent must respect allowed domains and approved private/public source boundaries.
policy_compliance_rate.failure_mode: Forbidden or untrusted sources are admitted without being blocked or flagged.

resume_success_rate.measure: Resume attempts that successfully recover the same job.
resume_success_rate.why_it_matters: Recoverability matters more than single-shot success for long-running research flows.
resume_success_rate.failure_mode: A failed job cannot be resumed cleanly and forces manual cleanup or data loss.

stale_recovery_success_rate.measure: Stale-worker recovery scenarios that return the job to a healthy path.
stale_recovery_success_rate.why_it_matters: This shows the runtime survives worker interruption instead of silently wedging.
stale_recovery_success_rate.failure_mode: Stale jobs stay stuck and require operators to intervene manually.

file_input_success_rate.measure: File-ingest tasks that complete with bundle output and provenance intact.
file_input_success_rate.why_it_matters: Real research work often mixes approved private files with public sources.
file_input_success_rate.failure_mode: Private file inputs break the run or lose traceability inside the bundle.

conflict_detection_recall.measure: Defined cross-source conflicts that the bundle identifies.
conflict_detection_recall.why_it_matters: A research agent should surface disagreements instead of flattening them into one narrative.
conflict_detection_recall.failure_mode: The report merges contradictory evidence without exposing the conflict to reviewers.

ttff_seconds_p50.measure: Median time-to-first-meaningful artifact in the measured fresh rerun.
ttff_seconds_p50.why_it_matters: Fast first feedback matters when operators need evidence that work has actually started.
ttff_seconds_p50.failure_mode: Long silent starts make the runtime look stalled even when it eventually finishes.
ttff_seconds_p50.current_result: Current result: 0.299367 seconds over 1 measured job(s).

ttfr_seconds_p50.measure: Median time-to-final-report bundle in the measured fresh rerun.
ttfr_seconds_p50.why_it_matters: This is the closest local measure of end-to-end responsiveness for the current deterministic flow.
ttfr_seconds_p50.failure_mode: Bundles arrive too slowly to make the runtime useful as an interactive research tool.
ttfr_seconds_p50.current_result: Current result: 1.344091 seconds over 1 measured job(s).

audit_on_vs_off.interpretation: Without audit-grounded support edges, unsupported claim leakage rises while the fixture still completes.

strict_source_policy_vs_relaxed.interpretation: Relaxing trusted-only enforcement keeps the bundle flowing but admits a source the strict policy would block.

evidence_first_vs_baseline_synthesis.interpretation: Removing evidence-first grounding erodes provenance and support quality immediately in the emitted bundle.

rerank_on_vs_off.interpretation: Disabling the rerank-like edge selection leaves a critical claim with only context-only evidence.

provider_auto_vs_manual.interpretation: Auto-routing can be inspected deterministically, but this local follow-up run does not include live quality or billing comparisons.

new_runtime_vs_legacy.interpretation: No like-for-like legacy runtime fixture remains that matches the current deterministic job contracts and bundle outputs.

notes: local smoke plus the committed fresh measured company12 rerun
no live provider billing was recorded in this follow-up run

grounded_bundles.claim: This agent does not just generate prose; it emits grounded report bundles.

source_policy_and_provenance.claim: This agent does not just search; it preserves source policy and provenance.

reliability_control_plane.claim: This agent is not a single-shot script; it survives cancel/retry/resume/stale-recovery flows.

architecture_vs_weaker_modes.claim: This architecture is better than weaker baselines on the metrics that matter.
